name: io.github.perceptdot/ga4
title: Perceptdot GA4
description: AI agent vision for Google Analytics 4 with automatic ROI measurement and reporting. perceptdot.com

environmentVariables.name: GA4_PROFILES
environmentVariables.description: Named GA4 profiles as JSON, e.g. {"project-a":"123456"}. Either this or GA4_PROPERTY_ID is required.

environmentVariables.name: GA4_DEFAULT_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Default profile name from GA4_PROFILES to use when no project is specified in a tool call.

environmentVariables.name: GA4_PROPERTY_ID
environmentVariables.description: Legacy single GA4 property ID. Used as fallback when GA4_PROFILES is not set.

environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Google service account JSON credentials for GA4 Data API access. Falls back to Application Default Credentials if unset.

environmentVariables.name: PERCEPT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: perceptdot API key (free 200 checks at perceptdot.com)
